name: Ross Coulthart
summary: Australian investigative journalist and NewsNation correspondent whose interviews have become central records in modern UAP disclosure reporting.
profileSummary: Australian investigative journalist and NewsNation correspondent whose interviews have become central records in modern UAP disclosure reporting.
background: Award-winning journalist, author, documentary producer, and NewsNation special correspondent.
inclusionNote: Included because his interviews with David Grusch, Jake Barber, and other sources materially shaped public awareness of modern UAP claims.
